client_updates.highlight: Lighthouse: release tomorrow; mainnet traffic halved on nodes running partial-message support (~150/2000 nodes)
Geth: first sparse blob pool PR merged to master; subsequent PRs (tests, protection) pending other clients' implementations
Erigon: switching to sparse blob pool testing; discv5/v4 improved with fork-hash filtering; targeting Glamsterdam devnet 7 enablement next week

spread_protocol.highlight: Spread: GossipSub extension providing sender anonymity + lower latency simultaneously via geography-aware cluster routing (Vivaldi coordinates)
Performance-optimized config cuts mean stretch/latency ~20–30% vs GossipSub; tail behavior improved considerably
Privacy-equivalent config holds attacker accuracy ~30% vs GossipSub's 38% at 10% adversarial nodes, while still faster
Key open concern: reduced early fan-out may allow message propagation failures; repropagation fallback exists but censorship resistance not yet analyzed
Raúl: attestation on-chain confirmation provides a natural feedback loop to score peer routes; Spread could leverage this as a simple callback from CL clients

action_items.action: Review Spread spec PR and implementation PR; provide feedback to authors
Measure Spread propagation degradation under malicious (non-forwarding) node scenarios

decisions.decision: Sparse blob pool enabled optionally in Glamsterdam devnet 7 (not mandatory)

targets.target: Sparse blob pool enabled on Glamsterdam devnet 7 — targeting next week
